item.text: I’ll inspect the repository guidance and working-tree diff first, then trace the changed code through its callers and run only non-test static checks if useful. I’ll keep the final response to the required JSON findings block.

item.text: The change is narrowly about session-scoping task resumption. I’m now checking every path that constructs, filters, and resumes task records, especially the behavior when a session ID is absent or when legacy jobs have no `sessionId`.

item.command: /bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '390,980p' plugins/codex/scripts/codex-companion.mjs && sed -n '180,520p' plugins/codex/scripts/lib/job-control.mjs && sed -n '1,320p' plugins/codex/scripts/lib/state.mjs && rg -n \"resolveLatestTrackedTaskThread|task-resume-candidate|SESSION_ID_ENV|CODEX_COMPANION_SESSION_ID|sessionId|findLatestTaskThread|resume-last\" . -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!vendor'"'"
